sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: US FDA issues Form 483 to Dr Reddy’s Andhra Pradesh formulations unit
feed.summary: Dr Reddy's Laboratories received a Form 483 with five observations from the US FDA following a GMP and PAI inspection at its Srikakulam, Andhra Pradesh formulations unit. The inspection took place from December 4 to December 12, 2025. The company plans to address these observations within the specified timeline.

feed.title: Moolec Science adjourns shareholder meeting due to lack of quorum
feed.summary: Moolec Science SA (NASDAQ:MLEC) announced the adjournment of its virtual extraordinary general meeting of shareholders to December 16, 2025, due to a lack of the required quorum. Only 39.85% of eligible shares were voted, falling short of the necessary threshold. The company stated that if a quorum isn't met at the rescheduled meeting, any present shareholders or proxies will constitute a quorum to proceed with the agenda.

feed.title: Pomerantz LLP Issues Reminder to CarMax, Inc. Shareholders – KMX
feed.summary: Pomerantz LLP has issued a reminder to CarMax, Inc. (NYSE: KMX) shareholders about a class action lawsuit filed against the company. The lawsuit alleges securities fraud and other unlawful business practices after CarMax reported second-quarter fiscal year 2026 earnings per share and sales that fell significantly short of consensus estimates, causing its stock price to drop. Shareholders who purchased CarMax securities during the Class Period have until January 2, 2026, to seek appointment as Lead Plaintiff.

feed.title: Ginsberg’s Foods acquired by food service giant Sysco
feed.summary: Ginsberg's Foods, a Hudson-based company with 300 employees, has been acquired by the food distribution giant Sysco Corp. The family-owned business, which started in 1909 as a grocery store, will continue under the leadership of John Bruise, with minimal impact expected on operations. Sysco, boasting $81 billion in fiscal 2025 sales and 337 distribution centers globally, will retain the established partnerships and brands of Ginsberg's Foods.

feed.title: A Valuation Chasm: Public Storage’s Stock Price and Analyst Estimates Diverge
feed.summary: Public Storage (US74460W5528) faces a significant valuation gap as its stock price of around $273-$285 contrasts sharply with Morningstar's $784 fair value estimate, despite a stable occupancy rate of 91.2%. This divergence appears driven by market focus on near-term rental rate deflation versus fundamental models emphasizing the company's real estate and balance sheet strength. Investors are closely watching the upcoming ex-dividend date on December 15, 2025, and Q4/FY 2025 earnings in late February 2026 for potential catalysts.

feed.title: At US$18.62, Is It Time To Put Mayville Engineering Company, Inc. (NYSE:MEC) On Your Watch List?
feed.summary: Mayville Engineering Company, Inc. (NYSE:MEC) has seen a significant price hike recently, trading at yearly-high levels. Despite this, the company appears to be fairly priced, being only slightly above its intrinsic value according to Simply Wall St's model. Future earnings growth is expected to be relatively unexciting at 9.6%, suggesting that growth is not the primary reason to invest in the company in the near term.

feed.title: Realty Income (O) Stock Update: Dividend Boost, $800M CityCenter Investment, and Fed Rate Cut Set the Tone for the Week Ahead (Updated Dec. 13, 2025)
feed.summary: Realty Income (O) concluded the week at $57.72, influenced by a dividend increase, an $800 million preferred equity investment in CityCenter Las Vegas, and a Federal Reserve rate cut. The article details these key developments, alongside analyst forecasts and important economic data releases for the upcoming week that could impact the stock. Investors are advised to monitor macro data as Realty Income's performance remains highly sensitive to interest rate fluctuations.

feed.title: Constellation Energy (CEG) Stock: Calpine Deal Milestones, Nuclear Restart Momentum, and What to Watch Next Week (Updated Dec. 13, 2025)
feed.summary: Constellation Energy (NASDAQ: CEG) experienced a volatile week ending December 12, 2025, with its stock closing down 7% on Friday, despite a modest weekly decline. The company is navigating significant events including progress on its $16.4 billion Calpine acquisition with DOJ agreement and FERC approval, and continued momentum in the nuclear energy sector bolstered by awards and federal support. Upcoming catalysts include a FERC meeting on data center co-location in PJM and further updates on Calpine deal mechanics, all contributing to a strong narrative but volatile trading environment for CEG.

feed.title: Arista Networks (ANET) Stock Update Today: AI Selloff Hits Shares After a Strong Run — What Happened This Week and What to Watch Next Week (Dec. 13, 2025)
feed.summary: Arista Networks (ANET) experienced a significant "AI trade" selloff this week, with shares falling 7.17% on Friday, December 12, after a seven-day winning streak, largely due to broader market de-risking from AI-linked equities. Despite this, the company announced constructive product news, including major updates to its Cognitive Campus portfolio with Arista VESPA and expanded "agentic AI" operations. The market's future movement for ANET will likely depend more on macro data and overall AI sentiment rather than company-specific news.

feed.title: Las Vegas Joins the Global Sports Scene as the Formula 1 Grand Prix Delivers Record-Breaking Tourism Growth, Boosting MGM Resorts, Caesars Palace, and Strip Hotels – What Tourists Should Know About Record-Breaking Bookings
feed.summary: The Las Vegas Grand Prix has significantly boosted the city's tourism and sports betting sectors, attracting 150,000 additional visitors and driving hotel occupancy above 98%. Despite temporary disruptions from road closures, major casino resorts like MGM Resorts, Wynn Resorts, and Caesars Entertainment experienced a substantial economic lift. The event also set records for betting volume, solidifying Las Vegas's status as a premier global destination and a hub for sports tourism.

feed.title: Oncternal Therapeutics (ONCT) Stock Price, News & Analysis
feed.summary: Oncternal Therapeutics (NASDAQ: ONCT) is a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company focused on developing oncology therapies. feed.title: Quanex Building Products CORP SEC 10-K Report
feed.summary: Quanex Building Products Corporation has released its annual Form 10-K report, highlighting significant financial and operational achievements, strategic initiatives, and challenges. The report details a 44% increase in net sales to $1,837.6 million, primarily due to the Tyman acquisition, despite reporting a net loss of $(250.8) million. Quanex continues to pursue growth through strategic acquisitions, investments in organic growth, and measures to address internal control weaknesses, while navigating market competition and geopolitical risks.

feed.title: Kestra Medical Technologies’ revenue up 53% to USD 22.6M in Q2 FY26

feed.title: Leadership Transition at Vulcan Materials Amid Strong Operational Performance
feed.summary: Vulcan Materials Company is undergoing a planned executive leadership transition, including new compensation packages for incoming CEO Ronnie Pruitt and current CEO J. Thomas Hill, who will become Executive Chairman. Analysts are largely positive, with several firms raising price targets, as the market anticipates full-year results and the company's performance under new leadership.
